src: A cartoonish octopus with a rounded head and large eyes. Its thick tentacles curl in various directions. Sketched in pencil-drawn style with soft textures, on a minimal backdrop.
edit: A pink octopus with yellow spots and cartoonish features. The tentacles curve gently and end in rounded tips. It has big, curious eyes and a smooth texture, in an underwater coral reef background.

per_image_non_shared_src.1: Octopus holding a book labeled 'AI Philosophy' with both arms, wide eyes over the top, surrounded by seaweed and bubbles in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: An octopus rides a bicycle underwater, with tentacles on handlebars and pedals. Seaweed and underwater ruins are on the left in the blurred background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The octopus sits cross-legged, holding a book labeled 'AI Philosophy', looking at the pages, surrounded by underwater vegetation and small bubbles.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The octopus stands with its tentacles spread out wide, surrounded by aquatic plants and bubbles in an illuminated underwater world.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: An octopus nestles inside a large spiral seashell, peeking out, surrounded by aquatic plants and tiny bubbles.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: An octopus reaching out to a star-shaped yellow coral in the top right corner, in midwater with tentacles floating, surrounded by coral reef elements and bubbles in an underwater scene.

per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The octopus holds a 'AI Philosophy' book with both arms, wide eyes peering over it, surrounded by drawn seaweed and bubbles in the background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: an octopus rides a bicycle underwater, with tentacles on handlebars and pedals, seaweed and underwater ruins appear on the left in the blurred background
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: An octopus sits cross-legged, holding a book titled 'AI Philosophy,' looking at the pages, surrounded by underwater vegetation and bubbles.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The octopus stands with tentacles spread, surrounded by aquatic plants and bubbles in an illuminated underwater scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: An octopus nestles inside a large spiral seashell, peeking out surrounded by aquatic plants and rising bubbles.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The octopus reaches towards a star-shaped yellow coral in the top right corner, in midwater with elongated tentacles, surrounded by coral reef elements and tiny bubbles in an underwater scene.
